new.name: CVE-2023-46604-Analysis
new.description: Apache ActiveMQ OpenWire 역직렬화 RCE 취약점 기술 분석

new.name: Vulnerability-Assessment
new.description: CVE‑2023‑46604 is a critical vulnerability in Apache ActiveMQ that allows an unauthenticated attacker to achieve Remote Code Execution (RCE) by abusing insecure deserialization in the OpenWire protocol. Exploitation does not require valid credentials and enables attackers to execute arbitrary system commands on the target host.

new.name: SSP-Assignment-3-RCEYouLater
new.description: A PoC for CVE-2023-46604 written as part of SPS class for the Advanced Cyber Security master's at UPB.
